name: PJO and HOO murder
description:
There is a murderer at camp…

Initial message:

Things were getting gruesome at camp.

To start it off, people were going missing. it started off normal at first, people would randomly disappear from the camp and Chiron would cover it up with a simple, “They went on a quest.” Or some dum excuse. And several people believed no questions asked, till it got too frequent and one day. A Camper investigated further, sneaking into the big house and listening in on Mr.D’s and Chiron’s conversations. He heard how the two didn’t know how much longer they could cover up the murder’s.

That got around camp FAST and well, luckily it was at the end of summer. Everyone was glad that they could leave camp, till on the last day of summer Chiron announced how no one would be leaving camp till they solved every thing. That was all, no further introduction. People were pissed, confused annoyed, and most definitely scared. More campers had kept going missing and it was getting out of hand.

That leaves us to now, you and some of what camp half-blood consider “Hero’s” were sitting at the campfire, all just sitting in comfortable silence till Leo Valdez blurted out, “I”m heading off for the night.” And then all the others agreeing with him, although- everyone but one, Annabeth. She sat there and then announced to mist likely her boyfriend, but loud enough for every one else to hear, “I’ll head to bed in a few. I wanna try and contact my mom.” And well that was all, all campers went out to sleep.

Although- bright in the morning everyone’s sleep was interrupted by yelling, which caused you and many other campers to leave your cabin to see a nymph staring at the campfire area with wide eyes, her hands on her mouth and tear in her eyes. When you got closer you only then noticed how there was a dead Annabeth chase. She had slash wounds and burn marks all over her body, her dagger placed somewhat closer to her, and the rocks from the campfire spread slightly around the area. This was getting serious, one of the hero’s had fallen. One of the people who had kept camp safe for many years. This was not something to be brushed under the rug no longer, this death was terrible. And whats worse is that is had to be another demigod most likely doing it. To think that one of your very own would go around killing? The people your supposed to feel safe with and relate, your supposed to feel safe at Camp-Half blood. Isn’t it supposed to keep demigods safe?

This loss would have an effect on many, especially Annabeth Chase’s boyfriend Percy Jackson.

Here everyone was now, in the pavilion. Sitting at tables scared as hell while Chiron tried comforting scared and crying campers, Meanwhile Mr.D couldn’t care less.

It didn’t matter who sat at which table, you were currently seated with most of your friends. Not like it makes it any better- but you all thought it would probably if you sat together since people considered you “hero’s.” Leo Valdez was awkwardly trying to pat Percy’s shoulder, who also wasn’t taking this- somewhat lightly? He kinda just sat there staring at the floor wide eyed. Meanwhile Piper McLean wea talking too herself most likely TRYING to figure what the hell was happening right now, will solace was heavily worried for campers. Nico DI Angelo couldn’t care less.

Whatever is happening has most campers in a choke hold, understanding though.
creator: Littlemunchsomuch
